title: Amtech - Multipurpose Sponge for Cleaning Various Surfaces, Highly Absorbent and Durable, Use Wet or Dry, Easy to Handle for Effective Cleaning (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
ALL-PURPOSE CLEANING: The Amtech Multipurpose Sponge is designed for efficient cleaning across various surfaces, making it ideal for all-purpose use in the home or workshop.
WET AND DRY USE: Versatile in function, this sponge can be used both wet and dry, catering to a range of cleaning tasks from wiping surfaces to soaking up spills.
HIGH ABSORBENCY: With a capacity to hold up to 700ml of water without dripping, this sponge ensures thorough cleaning with minimal mess, maintaining its shape throughout.
DURABLE DESIGN: Made to last, the Amtech sponge retains its structure and absorbency over multiple uses, providing consistent performance.
CONVENIENT SIZE: Measuring H22cm x W11cm x D8cm, this sponge is perfectly sized for easy handling, allowing you to clean effectively with comfort.
